title: roettlera schefferi
side_effects: Roettlera schefferi can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory problems in sensitive individuals. Ingestion of the plant's leaves or flowers can lead to nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea due to its toxic compounds. Prolonged exposure to the plant's essential oils may also cause headaches, dizziness, and fatigue in some people. Improper use of Roettlera schefferi can also exacerbate existing health conditions, such as asthma or eczema.
